creator: tut@nhamon.com.ua
text:
2006/10/28, Jarrod Sayers <jarrod@netleader.com.au>:

> Would you be able to send me a copy of command line you are running that
> generates this error? I am about to submit a PR to upgrade nagios-plugins
> to 1.4.4 and would like to base any patches to check_disk from that.

/usr/local/libexec/nagios/check_disk -w 20% -c 10% -p /

-- 
tut
DaRK VoIP GuRU
